subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the Wronged One unto him who hath turned towards God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, that utterance might draw him nigh unto the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن اقبل الی الله المهیمن القیوم لیقربه البیان الی افق
